visual_description: A computer screen displays technical data including licensee details, location coordinates, and scanning frequencies. A man with headphones around his neck looks intently at the screen. Another man adjusts his headset while standing near a window with blinds, followed by a view of two men, one in a cap and another in a white shirt, both facing forward.
